article_items.description: We're reporting live from Mountain View at Google's annual developer conference today. Stay tuned for the latest updates.

article_items.title: Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic
article_items.description: Google made a number of AI announcements at its annual developer conference, rolling out more-advanced models and agentic tools for its expansive user base.

article_items.title: Pentagon taps Shield AI for low-cost drone program as Iran war accelerates demand for cheap drones
article_items.description: Shield AI is fresh off a $1 billion funding round, which valued the company at $12.7 billion

article_items.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots | TechCrunch
article_items.description: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.
article_items.excerpt: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.
